emails.subject: ETA Amendment-Diamond-Koch L.P.
emails.body: ETA Amendment-Diamond-Koch L.P. Attached is the form of ETA Amendment we executed with Koch Energy Trading. The referenced Diamond Shamrock/Koch joint venture would like to execute the same one. Is this OK with you. Forever in your debt...Tana
